name: David Rouzer
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $147,300 for David Rouzer in U.S. House, NC-07. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
